en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: mhtuw wagi’ la, mkilux balay qu kayal.
en: B: The sun is coming out, it’s very hot.
A: Is it cold outside?
A: Is it cold outside?
B: It’s cold, so wear more clothes.
A: Will it be hot outside?
A: Will it be hot outside?
B: No, it’s windy and cool.
B: No, it’s windy and cool.
A: How is the weather today?
A: How is the weather today?

ab: ini’ kghzyaq ru ini’ kkilux kayal soni’, blaq qsliq.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It’s neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.

ab: ini’ kghzyaq ru ini’ kkilux kayal sawni’, blaq qsliq.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It’s neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.
A: How is the weather tonight?
A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: ungat yulung babaw kayal mhtuw bingah la.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.
A: How is the weather outside?
A: How is the weather outside?

ab: mnisan mswat, smbu’ wagi’ la, kya hawngu’ utux la.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: mnisan mswat, smbu’ wagi’ la, kya hawngu’ ’lyutux la.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.
A: How is the weather there?
A: How is the weather there?

ab: nyux sn’yal behuy nya’ te sami.
en: B: We’re going to have a big storm here.

ab: nyux sn’yal bayhuy nya’ tay sami.
en: B: We’re going to have a big storm here.
A: How’s the weather there?
A: How’s the weather there?
B: Very well, out of the big sun.
A: I have to go to school.
A: I have to go to school.
B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.
A: I’m going out.
A: I’m going out.

ab: pqwalax hazi’ kira’, laxi zyungi’ maras ruku’.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It’s going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.
A: Is it going to rain?

ab: minsbisu soni’ si baqi sa pqwalax kira’.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it’s supposed to rain later.

ab: minsbisu sawni’, si baqi sa pqwalax kira’.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it’s supposed to rain later.
A: Is it raining?

ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it’s stopped.

ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it’s stopped.
A: Is it raining?

ab: hazi’ minqwalax la, nyux si khuzyaq qu tuqi.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: mqwalax pi? swa’ su’ nyux si qrqarus?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: mqwalax ay. izyat saku’ minnaras ruku’.
ch: B:有下雨喔!我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It’s raining! I didn’t bring an umbrella.
A+: Are you all right?
A: Are you all right?
A: Are you all right?

ab: sn’yal behuy, memaw nyux mxal tunux maku’ znyupan nya’!
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.

ab: sn’yal bayhuy, maymaw nyux mxal tunux maku’ znyupan nya’!
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.
Are you okay?
Are you okay?
A: Are you all right?

ab: mkilux balay bnwan na wagi’ wah, memaw nyux mtkgil tunux maku’ la.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.

ab: mkilux balay bnwan na wagi’ wah, maymaw nyux mtkgil tunux maku’ la.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
